title: astragalus mesopotamicus var. olivieri
intro: Astragalus mesopotamicus var. olivieri, also known as olive astragalus, is a type of plant in the legume family that is native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of olive astragalus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Olive astragalus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
